package rulefixtures

// scenario for select_with_single_case: `select { case v := <-ch: ... }` with only one case and no default
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule635NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario635Negative(records []Rule635NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
